Rule.name: six_log_configurator
Rule.Description: Change the log4j2 runtime configuration in memory

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the action executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: operation
Argument.type: choice:List appenders,List configured loggers,List all loggers,Create appender,Install appender,Uninstall appender,Shutdown appender,Get log level,Set log level,Test appender,Test core logger,Test logger

Argument.name: appenderName
Argument.Description: Name of appender. Needs to start with # to create and shutdown appender.

Argument.name: loggerName
Argument.Description: Name of logger. Default: Root logger

Argument.name: logLevel
Argument.Description: Log level to set or to log with. Default: DEBUG
